=== info.txt
===================
===================
===================
Bushkill, Pennsylvania
Mountain Laurel Center
Tom Ridge Pavilion
August 16, 2003

No info.Great sound. Probably derived from the Theodore recording
  
Disc 1
01. Intro
02. Maggie's Farm (Bob on piano, Tommy on electric guitar) 
03. Seor (Tales Of Yankee Power) (Bob on piano, Tommy on electric guitar) 
04. Tweedle Dee & Tweedle Dum (Bob on piano, Tommy on electric guitar) 
05. You Ain't Goin' Nowhere (Bob on piano and harp, Tommy on electric guitar, Larry on pedal steel) 
06. Things Have Changed (Bob on piano, Tommy on electric guitar) 
07. Highway 61 Revisited (Bob on piano, Tommy on electric guitar) 
08. Can't Wait (Bob on piano, Tommy on electric guitar) 
09. Watching The River Flow (Bob on piano and harp, Tommy on electric guitar, Larry on resonator guitar) 
10. Drifter's Escape (Bob on piano and harp, Tommy on electric guitar) 
11. Just Like Tom Thumb's Blues (Bob on piano and harp, Tommy on electric guitar) 
12. Moonlight (Bob on piano, Tommy on electric guitar, Tony on standup bass) 
13. Honest With Me (Bob on piano, Tommy on electric guitar, Larry on slide guitar) 

Disc 2
01. Mr. Tambourine Man (acoustic) (Bob on piano and harp, Tommy on electric guitar) 
02. Band intros
03. Summer Days (Bob on piano, Tommy on electric guitar, Tony on standup bass) 
(encore) 
04. Like A Rolling Stone (Bob on piano) 
05. All Along The Watchtower (Bob on piano and harp) 


Concert # 1549 of The Never-Ending Tour. Concert # 25 of the 2003 US Summer Tour. 2003 concert # 59.
Concert # 48 with the 16th Never-Ending Tour Band: Bob Dylan (vocal & piano), Freddie Koella (guitar), Larry Campbell (guitar, mandolin, pedal steel guitar & electric slide guitar), Tony Garnier (bass), George Recile (drums & percussion).

13 acoustic with the band.
4, 8- 10, 13, 16 Bob Dylan (harmonica).
1-10, 11- 14 Tommy Morrongiello (guitar).
12 Larry Campbell (slide guitar).
